Home / Privacy

Privacy

How we handle data on this site.

This site uses privacy-friendly analytics to understand which pages are helpful. No personal data is collected or sold. We may show display advertising from Google AdSense; advertisers receive only the information AdSense itself collects, per their privacy policy at policies.google.com/privacy.

If you prefer to opt out of personalised ads, see aboutads.info/choices.

Outbound links to project websites and GitHub repos use rel="nofollow" so we pass no editorial endorsement by default.

OpenInstead — open source alternatives to the SaaS you already use. Updated April 2026.
Disclaimer: licensing, features and pricing change. Verify each tool's current status on its official site before committing.
